title: [Boatyard Dock]
description: Built over the rocks and sand of a promontory that juts a short distance into the Locksmehr River, this dock has been patched together several times since its creation.  Newer planks mingle with the old, and irregular gaps between them show that the work was done with haste rather than precision.  A stout fishing vessel is tethered to the pilings, its sails in dire need of mending, and a row of sturdy wooden dinghies is moored along the far end.
